title: Peruvian Sweet Potato Fries
description: Crispy Peruvian sweet potato fries recipe, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Peel the sweet potatoes and cut into long, thin strips.
In a bowl, toss the sweet potato strips with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
When the oil is hot, add a few sweet potato strips to the pan (do not overcrowd).
Fry the sweet potato strips for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove the fries from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining sweet potato strips.
Serve the Peruvian sweet potato fries hot and enjoy!
